key_finding: Anthropic circuit tracing QK blind spot validates our K-routing research direction. Retrieval heads (ICLR 2025 Oral) = 7th head specialization confirmation. KV cache steering (Belitsky Jul 2025) induces reasoning but no K/V decomposition — gap we fill. CoT faithfulness 25-39% (61-75% hidden). CRV (ICLR 2026 Oral) complementary method. Depth-recurrent latent CoT negative (counter-evidence for alternative arch).
evidence_impact: 5 new evidence entries (#110-115). Literature convergence upgraded to 22+ angles, 126+ papers. Strongest positioning for paper: our work fills Anthropic's QK blind spot.
next_planned: Experiment 101: Consider K-only vs V-only steering (new causal test), difficulty-dependent V|nums, or retrieval head overlap with H5.
